title: Enhanced Icicles
body:
Makes [Immersive Weathering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-weathering-forge)'s Icicles 3D instead of just a basic cross.

3D Icicles uses [xalixilax](https://www.curseforge.com/members/xalixilax/projects)'s [Enhanced Dripstone](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/enhanced-dripstone/) model  
  
Not so 3D Icicles uses [Bold\_Muddy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/bold_muddy/projects)'s [Not so 3D Dripstone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/not-so-3d-dripstone) model  
  
Compatible with any resourcepack that changes ice textures
